intro: The trail opens into a sun-dappled grove. Berry bushes crowd every clearing, heavy and ripe, and the air hums with the drone of something territorial deeper in the trees.
title: Woodland Forager
description: A berry-rich grove, ripe for the picking. Forage round by round for a growing haul, common berries giving way to rarer finds, but every push you make raises the chance a territorial swarm interrupts and forces a fight. Pack up early to keep the safe haul, or press your luck for more.

1.label: Forage the grove
1.tooltip:
(+) Gather a haul round by round
(?) Each push raises the chance a swarm attacks
1.selected: You step into the grove and start filling your pack...

2.label: Move on
2.selected: You leave the grove untouched and move on.

foragePrompt: Your pack holds {{berryCount}} berries{{ingredientNote}}. The droning is getting closer. Forage on, or pack up and leave?

push.label: Forage on
push.tooltip:
(+) Add to your haul, rarer finds the deeper you go
(?) Higher chance the swarm interrupts

foundBerry: You tuck a fresh berry into your pack.
foundIngredient: Tucked beneath the roots, you find a rare foraging ingredient!
swarmInterrupts: The droning erupts into a roar! A territorial swarm bursts from the trees - the berries you have gathered are safely stowed. Drive the swarm off and you can keep foraging!
